title: Azure Visuals
description: This pack offers full OptiFine parity,next level immersion, fabulous graphics  and ambiance with shaders, HDR support, zoom, fullbright AND more!
body:
## The pack:

It offers next level immersion, fabulous graphics and ambiance!

**It would be helpful if you could follow the project :)**  

## Updates:

It is updated as soon as i have time for it or it's logical.

>This is usually 1-7 days.

## For optimal experience:
> Allocate at least 4GB RAM  
> Use photon/bliss shaders (they have the best voxy support)

## Features:

в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Preconfigured mods and options**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Updates don't override YOUR configs!**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Fullbright**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Voice Chat**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Zoom**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Minimap and worldmap**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Better F3 menu**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Searchable keybinds**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**In game account switching**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Controller support**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Recording gameplay**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**In game shader, data and resource pack downloading!**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Infinite render distance***  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Older server compatibility**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Better chat**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**High quality screenshots**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Individual volume controll**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Amazing animations!**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Expanded and improved particles!**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Upgraded ambiance!**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Immersive music!**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Default texture pack profiles**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**HDR Support!**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Native wayland(wayGL) support**  
в–¶пёЏв•Џ**Fast updates**  

> It is not actual render distance. Check out the Voxy mod for more info.  
> _(Or bobby for older versions.)_
